tasks.subject: Task 1: Add justfile, delete Makefile, update flake.nix devShell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the build interface. After this task, `just --list` shows every recipe with its doc-comment, `just build` produces both binaries, `just test` runs the fast suite, and `nix develop` brings `just` along. The `Makefile` no longer exists.

**Files:**
- Create: `justfile`
- Delete: `Makefile`
- Modify: `flake.nix` (lines 68–76 — add `just` to `devShells.default.packages`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- justfile exists at repo root with the spec's recipe set
- Makefile removed
- `just --list` enumerates all recipes with `#` doc-comments
- `just build` produces ./breezyd and ./breezy
- `just test` exits 0
- `just check` exits 0
- `just clean` removes both binaries
- flake.nix devShell packages includes `just`
- no stale `make (build|test|lint|tidy|clean)` references outside the historical plan + new spec/plan docs

**Verify:** `test ! -f Makefile && just --list && just clean && just build && [ -x ./breezyd ] && [ -x ./breezy ] && just test && just check && grep -n 'just' flake.nix`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["justfile", "Makefile", "flake.nix"], "verifyCommand": "test ! -f Makefile && just --list && just clean && just build && [ -x ./breezyd ] && [ -x ./breezy ] && just test && just check && grep -n 'just' flake.nix", "acceptanceCriteria": ["justfile exists with full recipe set", "Makefile deleted", "just --list works", "just build produces both binaries", "just test exits 0", "just check exits 0", "flake.nix devShell includes just"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update README and CLAUDE.md to reference just
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace every `make` reference in operator-facing docs with the matching `just` invocation, and collapse the old `CGO_ENABLED=1 CC=clang` workaround paragraph since `just test-race` bakes the env into the recipe. Historical implementation plan in `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-03-twinfresh-cli.md` is left untouched.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md` (build/test block ~lines 75–85; Testing section ~lines 305–331)
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md` (Build/test/lint section ~lines 5–18; integration-test block; Nix line)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README "Build from source" lists `just build`, `just check`, `just test-race`
- README Testing section uses `just test-race` and a single-line `just test-integration <ip> <id> <password>`
- README no longer has the trailing `CGO_ENABLED=1 CC=clang` workaround block
- CLAUDE.md Build/test/lint section uses `just` recipes; clang note collapsed
- Single-test examples in CLAUDE.md remain raw `go`
- No `make (build|test|lint|tidy|clean)` strings remain in README or CLAUDE.md

**Verify:** `! grep -nE 'make (build|test|lint|tidy|clean)' README.md CLAUDE.md && grep -n 'just build\|just test-race\|just check\|just test-integration' README.md && grep -n 'just build\|just test-race\|just check' CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "! grep -nE 'make (build|test|lint|tidy|clean)' README.md CLAUDE.md && grep -n 'just build\\|just test-race\\|just check\\|just test-integration' README.md && grep -n 'just build\\|just test-race\\|just check' CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README references just throughout", "README Testing section uses just test-integration one-liner", "CLAUDE.md uses just recipes", "no stale make refs in either file", "single-test examples remain raw go"]}
```
